Extensive experiments show DPGCDR achieves state-of-the-art performance, with significant gains of up to 25% in HR@10 over baselines on datasets with heterogeneous interaction structures. Further analyses confirm our dynamic clustering mechanism effectively adapts to underlying data patterns, enabling fine-grained cross-domain knowledge transfer.

papers.title: Align³GR: Unified Multi-Level Alignment for LLM-based Generative Recommendation
papers.abstract:
Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate significant advantages in leveraging structured world knowledge and multi-step reasoning capabilities. However, fundamental challenges arise when transforming LLMs into real-world recommendation systems due to semantic and behavioral misalignment. 
To bridge this gap, we propose Align³GR, a novel framework that unifies token-level, behavior modeling-level, and preference-level alignment. Our approach introduces: Dual tokenization fusing user-item semantic and collaborative signals. Enhanced behavior modeling with bidirectional semantic alignment. Progressive DPO strategy combining self-play (SP-DPO) and real-world feedback (RF-DPO) for dynamic preference adaptation. Experiments show Align³GR outperforms the SOTA baseline by +17.8% in Recall@10 and +20.2% in NDCG@10 on the public dataset, with significant gains in online A/B tests and full-scale deployment on an industrial large-scale recommendation platform.

papers.title: NP-MiSR: Neural Process-based Multi-Interest Learning for Session-Based Recommendation
papers.abstract: Session-based recommendation (SBR) aims to provide users with satisfactory suggestions via modeling preferences based on short-term, anonymous user-item interaction sequences. Traditional single interest learning methods struggle to align with the diverse nature of preferences. Recent advances resolved this bottleneck by learning multiple interest embeddings for each session. However, due to the pre-defining scheme of interest quantity (e.g. the number of interests), these approaches are deficient in adaptive ability towards distinctive preference patterns across different users. Moreover, these methods rely solely on the current session and ignore useful information from related ones. The short-term property of sessions would magnify the insufficient representation issue. To address these limitations, we propose a Neural Process-based Multi-interest learning framework for Session-based Recommendation, namely NP-MiSR. To be specific, our method enables adaptive multi-interest representation learning through two complementary mechanisms: 1) Neural Process-based Intra-session interest modeling: We employ Neural Processes to model the distribution of interests within a session, where the fixed interest configurations are no longer needed. 2) Cross-session context fusion: We extract interest distributions of similar sessions as contextual priors to refine the current session’s interest representation. Extensive experiments on three datasets demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms state-of-the-art SBR approaches with an average improvement of 38.8%. Moreover, the few-shot learning task reveals that NP-MiSR achieves a surprisingly favorable efficiency v.s. performance trade-off where utilizing only 10% of the training data attains 95% of the recommendation performance.

papers.title: Stable and Adaptive Fusion for Multi-domain Multi-task Recommendation
papers.abstract: Multi-Domain Multi-Task (MDMT) recommendation aims to provide personalized recommendations by leveraging information across multiple domains and tasks. However, existing methods often suffer from spurious correlations between irrelevant features and the target, leading to negative transfer. To address this, we propose a Stable and Adaptive Fusion (SAF) framework for MDMT recommendation. SAF introduces a weighted  Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC) loss to decorrelate irrelevant features from the target, learning sample weights that promote stable (i.e., robust to spurious correlations) representations in both bottom and expert layers. We employ Random Fourier Features (RFF) to enable scalable computation of the HSIC loss. We further employ adaptive feature and expert gating to select these stable features, enabling the model to capture intricate cross-domain and cross-task dependencies. The learned sample weights are also used to reweight the MDMT loss during training. Experiments on large-scale datasets show that SAF outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by up to 2% in AUC. To facilitate further research, we release a new industrial dataset with 30 million interactions across 3 domains and 2 tasks, with 300 features.

papers.title: Causal Direct Preference Optimization for Distributionally Robust Generative Recommendation
papers.abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) guides large language models (LLMs) to generate recommendations aligned with user historical behavior distributions by minimizing preference alignment loss. However, our systematic empirical research and theoretical analysis reveal that DPO tends to amplify spurious correlations caused by environmental confounders during the alignment process, significantly undermining the generalization capability of LLM-based generative recommendation methods in out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios. To mitigate this issue, we propose CausalDPO, an extension of DPO that incorporates a causal invariance learning mechanism. This method introduces a backdoor adjustment strategy during the preference alignment phase to eliminate interference from environmental confounders, explicitly models the latent environmental distribution using a soft clustering approach, and enhances robust consistency across diverse environments through invariance constraints. Theoretical analysis demonstrates that CausalDPO can effectively capture users' stable preference structures across multiple environments, thereby improving the OOD generalization performance of LLM-based recommendation models. We conduct extensive experiments under four representative distribution shift settings to validate the effectiveness of CausalDPO, achieving an average performance improvement of 24.10\% across four evaluation metrics.

papers.title: Bid Farewell to Seesaw: Towards Accurate Long-Tail Session-Based Recommendation via Dual Constraints of Hybrid Intents
papers.abstract: Session-based recommendation (SBR) aims to predict anonymous users' next interaction based on their interaction sessions. In practical recommendation scenario, low-exposure items constitute the majority of interactions, creating a long-tail distribution that severely compromises recommendation diversity. Existing approaches attempt to address this issue by promoting tail items but incur accuracy degradation, exhibiting a "see-saw" effect between long-tail and accuracy performance. We attribute such conflict to session-irrelevant noise within the tail item set, which existing long-tail approaches fail to identify and constrain effectively. To resolve our fundamental conflict, we propose HID (Hybrid Intent-based Dual Constraint Framework), a plug-and-play framework that transforms the conventional "see-saw" into a "win-win" relationship through introducing the hybrid intent-based dual constraints. Two key innovations are incorporated in this framework: (i) Hybrid Intent Learning, where we reformulate the intent extraction strategies by employing attribute-aware spectral clustering to reconstruct the item-to-intent mapping. Furthermore, discrimination of session-irrelevant noise is achieved through the assignment of both target and noise intents to each sessions. (ii) Intent Constraint Loss, where we propose two novel constraint paradigms regarding the diversity and accuracy to regulate the representation learning process, and unify the two optimization objectives into a unique loss. Extensive experiments across multiple SBR models and datasets demonstrate that HID can enhance both long-tail performance and recommendation accuracy, establishing new state-of-the-art performance in long-tail recommender systems.

papers.title: DiMA: Distinguishing Resident and Tourist Preferences via Multi-Modal LLM Alignment for Out-of-Town Cross-Domain Recommendation
papers.abstract: Out-of-Town (OOT) recommendation aims to provide personalized suggestions for users in unfamiliar cities. However, OOT recommendation faces two fundamental challenges: the difficulty of reasoning across modalities, as preference signals in disparate formats such as images and text are hard to compare; and the preference deviation problem, since a user's resident and tourist preferences often diverge, rendering simple preference transfer ineffective. To address these challenges, we propose Distinguishing Resident and Tourist Preferences via Multi-Modal LLM Alignment for Out-of-Town Cross-Domain Recommendation (DiMA), a framework for re-ranking Points of Interest (POIs). To tackle the multimodal challenge, DiMA first leverages Multimodal Large Language Models and Large Language Models (LLMs) to transform heterogeneous POI data into unified semantic tags, enabling both cross-modal reasoning and efficient downstream processing. To address preference deviation, a ``teacher'' LLM executes a custom Chain-of-Thought (CoT) process to disentangle resident and tourist preferences from multi-city histories for re-ranking. Finally, a lightweight student model learns this CoT reasoning via Supervised Fine-Tuning and is then refined with Direct Preference Optimization to align with true user choices, with the potential to surpass the teacher. Extensive experiments on a real-world dataset demonstrate that DiMA significantly enhances the performance of baseline models in the OOT recommendation re-ranking task.

papers.title: Explicit Intent-Enhanced Knowledge Distillation for Trip Recommendation
papers.abstract:
Trip recommendation aims to generate a sequence of points of interest (POIs) under a user's query input. Existing data-driven methods mainly fall into two categories: supervised approaches and self-supervised approaches. The former cannot fully capture the transition patterns among POIs, while the latter fail to comprehensively model user's query intents.
Fortunately, privileged knowledge distillation (PKD) provides us an unique opportunity to align user's query intents with its corresponding trip in historical data. However, such knowledge alignment is implicit, which may not directly reflect the query intents. To this end, in this paper, we propose EKD-Trip, an explicit intent-enhanced knowledge distillation framework. EKD-Trip first trains a trajectory encoder (teacher model) and a trip generator jointly in a self-supervised manner. Then, a query encoder (student model) is trained via multi-task learning to extract implicit knowledge by PKD from teacher and explicit knowledge from an auxiliary task, respectively. At inference time, we use the query encoder and the trip generator to recommend trips. Extensive experiments on four real-world datasets demonstrate that EKD-Trip outperforms all baselines over three metrics, with a particularly notable improvement of 13.70% in pairs-F1.

papers.title: LLM-Aligned Geographic Item Tokenization for Local-Life Recommendation
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) have enhanced text-based recommendation by enriching traditional ID-based methods with semantic generalization capabilities. Text-based methods typically encode item textual information via prompt design and generate discrete semantic IDs through item tokenization. However, in domain-specific tasks such as local-life services, simply injecting location information into prompts fails to capture fine-grained spatial characteristics and real-world distance awareness among items. To address this, we propose LGSID, an LLM-Aligned Geographic Item Tokenization Framework for Local-life Recommendation. This framework consists of two key components: (1) RL-based Geographic LLM Alignment, and (2) Hierarchical Geographic Item Tokenization. In the RL-based alignment module, we initially train a list-wise reward model to capture real-world spatial relationships among items. We then introduce a novel G-DPO algorithm that uses pre-trained reward model to inject generalized spatial knowledge and collaborative signals into LLMs while preserving their semantic understanding. Furthermore, we propose a hierarchical geographic item tokenization strategy, where primary tokens are derived from discrete spatial and content attributes, and residual tokens are refined using the aligned LLM’s geographic representation vectors. Extensive experiments on real-world Kuaishou industry datasets show that LGSID consistently outperforms state-of-the-art discriminative and generative recommendation models. Ablation studies, visualizations, and case studies further validate its effectiveness.

papers.title: Dual-Horizon Interest Model for Unified Search and Recommendation
papers.abstract: Search and recommendation are pivotal for information access and are increasingly unified to exploit shared user-item interactions. Both tasks suffer from data sparsity, which joint modeling can mitigate by integrating behavioral data with or without explicit queries. However, existing unified frameworks rarely distinguish between users’ long- and short-term interests, despite their divergent temporal dynamics in search and recommendation. In this work, we propose a novel model, DHIM, which explicitly disentangles and integrates users' long- and short-term interests across both the search and recommendation scenarios. First, long- and short-term interests are independently extracted from search and recommendation using a unified extraction strategy. These interests are then adaptively integrated via a cross-scenario fusion module. A self‐supervised contrastive loss supervises the learning of both interest types within and across scenarios. The resulting representations are fed into downstream search and recommendation models for prediction. Extensive experiments on two public benchmarks demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms single-scenario and state-of-the-art joint models, achieving superior accuracy and generalizability. To our knowledge, this is the first work to incorporate explicit dual-horizon interest modeling into a unified search and recommendation framework with self-supervised contrastive learning.

papers.title: Mitigating Reward Hacking in LLM-based Recommendation: A Preference Optimization Approach
papers.abstract:
Post-training adaptation has become the central paradigm for leveraging large language models (LLMs) in recommendation. 
While recent preference optimization methods, such as Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), enhance pairwise preference discrimination, they remain vulnerable to \emph{reward hacking}: models exploit imperfections in reward signals, leading to inflated training metrics without genuine recommendation gains.
We analyze this issue from a gradient perspective and formalize the concept of the 
\emph{$\varepsilon$-insensitive region}, where pairwise updates exert little influence on the ordering between positives and unsampled negatives.
Under the Bradley–Terry model, we further show that these regions can occupy a substantial fraction of the preference space, inevitably leading to misaligned rankings.
To address this issue, we propose Simulated Preference Optimization for Reward-hacking mitigation using Pseudo-negatives (SIRIUS). 
Our framework introduces pseudo-negative samples to enrich contrastive signals and reduce the prevalence of $\varepsilon$-insensitive regions.
Extensive experiments on three public benchmarks show that \our{} consistently improves ranking quality and effectively mitigates reward hacking, providing both theoretical and practical insights for advancing LLM-based recommendation. 
Our code is available at
\url{https://anonymous.4open.science/r/C557-id}

papers.title: Bidirectional Counterfactual Distillation for Review-Based Recommendation
papers.abstract:
Review-based recommendation methods typically integrate multiple behaviors, including interactions, reviews, and ratings, to model user preferences. To effectively extract preference signals from diverse behaviors, some studies train multiple student models to capture distinct behavioral patterns, and leverage online distillation to facilitate collaborative learning among them. However, we argue that these techniques suffer from bias contamination from rating distributions and feature homogenization during cross-behavior knowledge transfer: (1) Rating distribution bias, arising from non-uniform historical ratings, propagates across behaviors through distillation, contaminating the true preference representations of other behaviors. (2) Static distillation strategies often lead to homogenized behavioral features, hindering the learning of behavior-specific preferences. 
To address these issues, we propose a novel Bidirectional Counterfactual Distillation (BiCoD) framework for review-based recommendation. In BiCoD, we first design an adversarial counterfactual distillation module to suppress the impact of non-uniform rating distributions on distillation, thereby preventing it from contaminating the user's true preference representations across behaviors. Subsequently, we introduce a stage-aware bidirectional distillation strategy to enhance the distinctiveness of behavioral features, facilitating the effective learning of behavior-specific preferences. Extensive experiments on five real-world datasets validate the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed framework.

papers.title: DMGIN: How Multimodal LLMs Enhance Large Recommendation Models for Lifelong User Post-click Behaviors
papers.abstract:
Modeling user interest based on lifelong user behavior sequences is crucial for enhancing Click-Through Rate (CTR) prediction. However, long post-click behavior sequences themselves pose severe performance issues: the sheer volume of data leads to high computational costs and inefficiencies in model training and inference. Traditional methods address this by introducing two-stage approaches, but this compromises model effectiveness due to incomplete utilization of the full sequence context. More importantly, integrating multimodal embeddings into existing large recommendation models (LRM) presents significant challenges: These embeddings often exacerbate computational burdens and mismatch with LRM architectures. 
To address these issues and enhance the model's efficiency and accuracy, we introduce Deep Multimodal Group Interest Network (DMGIN). Given the observation that user post-click behavior sequences contain a large number of repeated items with varying behaviors and timestamps, DMGIN employs Multimodal LLMs(MLLM) for grouping to reorganize complete lifelong post-click behavior sequences more effectively, with almost no additional computational overhead, as opposed to directly introducing multimodal embeddings. To mitigate the potential information loss from grouping, we have implemented two key strategies. First, we analyze behaviors within each group using both interest statistics and intra-group transformers to capture group traits. Second, apply inter-group transformers to temporally ordered groups to capture the evolution of user group interests. Our extensive experiments on both industrial and public datasets confirm the effectiveness and efficiency of DMGIN. The A/B test in our LBS advertising system shows that DMGIN improves CTR by 4.7% and Revenue per Mile by 2.3%.

papers.title: Breaking the Aggregation Bottleneck in Federated Recommendation: A Personalized Model Merging Approach
papers.abstract: Federated recommendation (FR) facilitates collaborative training by aggregating local models from massive devices, enabling client-specific personalization while ensuring privacy. However, we empirically and theoretically demonstrate that server-side aggregation can undermine client-side personalization, leading to suboptimal performance, i.e., the aggregation bottleneck. This issue stems from the inherent heterogeneity across numerous clients in FR, which drives the global model to deviate from local optima. To this end, we propose FedEM, which elastically merges the global and local models to compensate for impaired personalization. Unlike existing personalized federated recommendation (pFR) methods, FedEM (1) investigates the aggregation bottleneck in FR through theoretical insights, rather than relying on heuristic analysis; (2) leverages off-the-shelf local models rather than designing additional mechanisms to boost personalization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method preserves client personalization during collaborative training, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.

papers.title: CoS: Towards Optimal Event Scheduling via Chain-of-Scheduling
papers.abstract: Recommending event schedules is a key issue in Event-based Social Networks (EBSNs) in order to maintain user activity. An effective recommendation is required to maximize the user's preference, subjecting to  both time and geographical constraints. Existing methods face an inherent trade-off among efficiency, effectiveness, and generalization, due to the NP-hard nature of the problem. This paper proposes the Chain-of-Scheduling (CoS) framework, which activates the event scheduling capability of Large Language Models (LLMs) through a guided, efficient scheduling process. CoS enhances LLM by formulating the schedule task into three atomic stages, i.e., exploration, verification and integration. Then we enable the LLMs to generate CoS autonomously via Knowledge Distillation (KD). Experimental results show that CoS achieves near-theoretical optimal effectiveness with high efficiency on three real-world datasets in a interpretable manner. Moreover, it demonstrates strong zero-shot learning ability on out-of-domain data.

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Out-of-town cross-domain recommendation distinguishing tourist preferences via multimodal LLM alignment
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通过多模态LLM对齐区分游客偏好，实现外地跨域推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通过多模态LLM对齐区分游客偏好，实现外地跨域推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes DiMA for out-of-town POI recommendation, addressing multimodal reasoning and preference deviation between resident and tourist via multi-modal LLM alignment.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 外地推荐面临跨模态偏好推理和居民/游客偏好偏差问题。本文提出DiMA框架，通过多模态LLM对齐统一图像和文本偏好信号，并设计游客偏好提取模块。在OOT推荐数据集上，DiMA显著提高了POI重排质量，尤其对游客群体效果突出。该工作推进了旅游场景下的个性化推荐。
llm_ranked.title_zh: DiMA：通过多模态LLM对齐区分居民和游客偏好的外地跨域推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 外地推荐中用户居民和游客偏好差异大，且多模态信号难以统一推理。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 利用多模态LLM对齐图像和文本偏好，并设计偏好偏差纠正模块。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在真实外地推荐数据上，DiMA的NDCG和召回率均大幅超过基线方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 区分居民和游客偏好并跨模态对齐是提升旅游推荐效果的关键。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: contextual recommendation, regret bounds
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 上下文推荐，遗憾界
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 上下文推荐，遗憾界
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Provides finite and corruption-robust regret bounds for online inverse linear optimization (contextual recommendation) under M-convex action sets.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文研究在线逆向线性优化（即上下文推荐）在M-凸动作集下的遗憾界。针对此前遗憾界要么仅对特定动作集有效要么指数级大的问题，作者证明了有限且抗腐败的遗憾界，为上下文推荐系统提供了重要的理论保证。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 在线逆向线性优化中M-凸动作集下的有限且抗腐败遗憾界
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 在线逆向线性优化（上下文推荐）中现有遗憾界不够通用，需要更紧凑的有限界。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出M-凸动作集下的在线逆向线性优化框架，推导出有限且抗腐败的遗憾界。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 获得了在M-凸动作集下有限且抗腐败的遗憾界，改进了先前指数级界。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该工作为上下文推荐提供了理论保证，推动了推荐系统在线学习理论的发展。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: proactive recommendation, RL for recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 主动推荐，强化学习推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 主动推荐，强化学习推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes ProRL, a reinforcement learning method for proactive recommender systems that rectifies policy gradient estimation to overcome length-dependent bias and step-weighting issues.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出ProRL，一种用于主动推荐系统的强化学习方法。主动推荐系统通过生成中间推荐路径引导用户偏好迁移，但现有策略梯度存在长度依赖偏置和步权重问题。ProRL通过纠正策略梯度估计解决了这些问题，在多个数据集上提升了推荐效果。
llm_ranked.title_zh: ProRL：通过纠正策略梯度估计实现主动推荐的有效强化学习
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 主动推荐系统中策略梯度估计存在长度依赖偏置和步权重不当问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出ProRL，通过纠正策略梯度估计来消除偏置并改进步权重分配。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明ProRL在推荐准确性和路径效率上优于现有方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: ProRL为主动推荐提供了一种有效的强化学习解决方案。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: interpretable recommender systems, sparse autoencoder
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 可解释推荐系统，稀疏自编码器
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 可解释推荐系统，稀疏自编码器
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Uses sparse autoencoders with a prediction-aware objective to extract monosemantic neurons from user and item embeddings in recommender systems.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出一种从推荐系统用户和物品嵌入中提取单语义神经元的方法。通过稀疏自编码器和预测感知训练目标，学习到的神经元能捕捉类别、流行度、时间趋势等概念，同时保持用户-物品交互结构，显著提升了推荐系统的可解释性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 提取推荐系统中交互感知的单语义概念
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 推荐系统嵌入缺乏可解释性，现有概念提取方法未考虑用户-物品交互。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 采用稀疏自编码器，并引入预测感知目标，通过冻结推荐模型反向传播来对齐潜在结构与预测。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 提取的神经元能捕捉类别、流行度等概念，并支持解释性应用。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该方法使推荐系统嵌入更可解释，有助于模型调试和用户信任。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: session-based recommendation, long-tail
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 会话推荐，长尾分布
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 会话推荐，长尾分布
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes HID, a method for session-based recommendation that uses dual constraints of hybrid intents to resolve the seesaw effect between long-tail and accuracy performance.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文针对会话推荐中的长尾问题，提出HID方法。现有方法在提升长尾推荐时往往牺牲准确率，形成跷跷板效应。HID通过混合意图的双重约束，在提升长尾物品推荐的同时保持了准确率，实验证明有效缓解了该矛盾。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 告别跷跷板：通过混合意图的双重约束实现准确的长尾会话推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 会话推荐中长尾物品推荐与准确率之间存在跷跷板效应。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出混合意图的双重约束机制，识别并约束会话无关噪声，同时保留有用长尾信号。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个会话推荐数据集上，HID在长尾指标和准确率上均取得提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: HID为会话推荐中的长尾-准确率权衡提供了有效解决方案。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: sequential recommendation, data augmentation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 序列推荐，数据增强
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 序列推荐，数据增强
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Presents RaSR, a relation-guided dataset augmentation and regeneration framework for sequential recommendation that improves data quality without increasing training complexity.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出RaSR框架，用于序列推荐的数据中心化增强。现有方法要么高成本学习物品关系，要么生成模式缺乏可解释性。RaSR通过关系引导的生成模型，在保证可解释性的同时有效增强数据集质量，提升了序列推荐性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于关系增强生成的数据中心化序列推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 序列推荐中数据质量提升面临关系挖掘困难，现有方法要么成本高要么可解释性差。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出关系引导的数据集增强与再生框架RaSR，利用生成模型自适应学习交互模式并注入关系信息。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明RaSR在多个序列推荐数据集上显著提升了推荐准确率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: RaSR为数据中心化序列推荐提供了一种高效且可解释的解决方案。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: LLM-based recommenders, GFlowNets
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于LLM的推荐，生成流网络
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于LLM的推荐，生成流网络
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Identifies non-identifiability issues in GFlowNets for offline LLM-based recommendation and proposes conservative objectives to mitigate distributional shift.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文研究了生成流网络(GFlowNets)在离线LLM推荐中的应用问题。发现现有GFlowNet目标在离线设置下存在不可识别性，导致分布偏移。作者提出保守性目标，在固定日志数据上有效缓解了流估计过高和正向质量泄漏等问题，提升了推荐多样性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 使用保守生成流网络改进基于LLM的推荐系统
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有GFlowNet在离线LLM推荐中存在不可识别性和分布偏移问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 分析三种不可识别性来源，并提出保守的目标函数限制概率质量分配到无支持区域。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在离线推荐数据集上，提出的方法提升了推荐多样性和准确性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该工作为LLM推荐中GFlowNet的离线应用提供了理论基础和实用改进。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: federated context-aware recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 联邦上下文感知推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 联邦上下文感知推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes FedCAR, a federated context-aware recommendation framework that leverages user recent interactions as behavioral context to guide prediction.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出FedCAR，一种联邦上下文感知推荐框架。现有联邦推荐系统使用静态用户嵌入，忽略了行为模式且需大量数据调优。FedCAR动态利用用户近期交互作为上下文构建表示进行预测，在保护隐私的同时提升了推荐效果。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 联邦上下文感知个性化推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 联邦推荐系统中静态用户嵌入忽略行为模式，可解释性差且需大量数据。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出FedCAR，利用用户近期交互动态构建上下文表示，替代静态嵌入。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明FedCAR在多个联邦推荐场景下优于基线方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: FedCAR为隐私保护下的上下文感知推荐提供了一种有效方案。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: multi-source multi-scenario recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多源多场景推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多源多场景推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes MM4Rec, a unified framework for multi-source and multi-scenario recommendation with a Source-Aware Transformer and Multi-Scenario Behavior Extraction Layer.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出MM4Rec，一个统一的多源多场景推荐框架。现有方法分别建模各源场景，无法利用跨上下文信号。MM4Rec通过源感知Transformer编码器联合建模异构输入，多场景行为抽取层捕捉场景动态，趋势感知学习器增强时间表示，在多个场景中提升了推荐效果。
llm_ranked.title_zh: MM4Rec：面向统一用户偏好的多源多场景推荐系统
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有推荐系统分别建模不同源和场景，忽略了跨上下文的共享和互补信号。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出MM4Rec框架，包括源感知Transformer、多场景行为抽取层和趋势感知学习器。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在跨场景推荐中，MM4Rec显著优于单源单场景方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: MM4Rec实现了多源多场景下的统一用户偏好建模，提升了推荐系统的泛化能力。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: graph recommendation, LLM-enhanced
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 图推荐，LLM增强
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 图推荐，LLM增强
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes CCLRec, a consensus-driven contrastive learning framework that deeply integrates graph structure and LLM-derived semantics for recommendation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出CCLRec，一个共识驱动的对比学习框架用于LLM增强的图推荐。现有方法分离处理图结构和LLM语义，导致结构近邻与语义相关性的监督差距。CCLRec通过对比学习深度融合两者，实验证明在多个推荐数据集上取得了最佳性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: CCLRec：基于共识的对比学习用于LLM增强的图推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: LLM增强的图推荐中图结构信息和LLM语义知识分离，导致监督差距。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出共识驱动的对比学习，联合优化结构表示和语义表示。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个基准数据集上，CCLRec超越了现有图推荐和LLM增强方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: CCLRec为图推荐与LLM的深度融合提供了有效范式。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: generative recommendation, causal DPO
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 生成式推荐，因果直接偏好优化
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 生成式推荐，因果直接偏好优化
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes CausalDPO, a DPO extension with causal invariance learning to improve OOD generalization in LLM-based generative recommendation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 该论文提出CausalDPO，解决直接偏好优化(DPO)在生成式推荐中放大伪相关的问题。现有DPO受环境混杂因素影响，导致分布外泛化差。CausalDPO引入因果不变性学习，通过后门调整策略减少伪相关，增强了推荐系统在分布外场景的鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 用于分布鲁棒生成式推荐的因果直接偏好优化
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: DPO在LLM生成式推荐中放大伪相关，导致分布外泛化能力差。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出CausalDPO，在偏好对齐过程中引入后门调整和因果不变性学习。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验表明CausalDPO在分布外场景下显著提升了推荐准确性和鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: CausalDPO为生成式推荐提供了分布鲁棒的偏好对齐方法。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Session-based recommendation, sequential modeling
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于会话的推荐，序列建模
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于会话的推荐，序列建模
llm_ranked.tldr_en: GraphFine uses multi-granular graph learning to capture fine-grained behavioral patterns in session-based recommendation, addressing the limitation of global aggregation that overlooks transient user intents.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有会话推荐方法往往忽略用户意图中瞬时和细粒度的行为模式。本文提出GraphFine，通过多粒度图学习感知细粒度行为模式，能够捕捉从即时偏好到长期目标的多样化用户意图。实验表明该方法在多个基准数据集上显著优于现有模型，为会话推荐提供了更精准的个性化建模方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 多粒度图学习与细粒度行为模式感知的会话推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有会话推荐方法依赖于全局聚合，忽略了会话中短暂的细粒度行为模式。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出GraphFine模型，采用多粒度图学习框架，从即时、片段共现和长期目标等多个粒度感知用户行为模式。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个公开数据集上，GraphFine在召回率和MRR等指标上优于现有会话推荐方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 多粒度图学习能有效捕捉用户意图的动态变化，提升会话推荐准确性。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Session-based recommendation, multi-interest learning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于会话的推荐，多兴趣学习
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于会话的推荐，多兴趣学习
llm_ranked.tldr_en: NP-MiSR uses neural processes for adaptive multi-interest learning in session-based recommendation, automatically determining the number of interests per session.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有会话推荐的多兴趣方法需要预定义兴趣数量，无法适应不同用户的偏好模式。本文提出NP-MiSR，基于神经过程自适应学习每个会话的兴趣数量，并利用相关会话的信息。实验表明该方法在多个基准上表现优异，为会话推荐提供了灵活的兴趣建模方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于神经过程的多兴趣学习用于会话推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有会话推荐的多兴趣方法需要预定义兴趣数量，缺乏适应性。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 利用神经过程自适应学习每个会话的兴趣数量和表示，并集成相关会话信息。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个会话推荐数据集上，NP-MiSR在推荐准确性上超越了固定兴趣数量的方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 神经过程能灵活建模多兴趣，提升会话推荐对用户偏好的适应能力。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Geography-aware conversational recommendation for travel
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 地理感知的对话推荐用于旅游
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 地理感知的对话推荐用于旅游
llm_ranked.tldr_en: GeoCRS framework integrates multimodal geographic information with LLMs for travel-related conversational recommendation, bridging the gap between dynamic user intent and static geographic context.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 旅游场景中的对话推荐需要融合地理信息，但现有方法难以处理多模态地理数据与对话上下文的异构性。本文提出地理感知对话推荐框架GeoCRS，通过多模态融合策略对齐用户意图和地理上下文。实验证明该框架能显著提升旅游推荐的相关性和准确性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 从对话到目的地：结合多模态融合的地理感知大语言模型用于对话推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 旅游对话推荐中用户意图与地理上下文存在不对称依赖，现有融合策略效果有限。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出GeoCRS，利用多模态融合对齐动态对话上下文与静态地理信息。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在旅游对话数据集上，GeoCRS在推荐相关性和对话流畅性上均取得最优结果。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 地理感知多模态融合能有效提升旅游对话推荐的实用性。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: deep learning fusion framework for multi-domain multi-task recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多域多任务推荐的深度学习融合框架
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多域多任务推荐的深度学习融合框架
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes SAF, a stable and adaptive fusion framework using weighted HSIC loss to decorrelate irrelevant features and RFF for scalability, improving multi-domain multi-task recommendation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 针对多域多任务推荐中特征与目标间的伪相关导致负迁移问题，提出稳定自适应融合框架SAF。该框架引入加权的Hilbert-Schmidt独立性准则损失，学习样本权重以解耦无关特征，并在底层和专家层促进稳定表征。采用随机傅里叶特征实现可扩展计算。实验证明SAF有效缓解负迁移，提升推荐准确性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 稳定自适应融合用于多域多任务推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有多域多任务推荐方法常因特征与目标间的伪相关导致负迁移
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SAF框架，引入加权HSIC损失解耦无关特征，利用RFF实现可扩展计算
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个多域多任务数据集上显著缓解负迁移，提升推荐性能
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: SAF通过稳定表征学习有效提升多域多任务推荐的鲁棒性
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: preference optimization for LLM-based recommendation to mitigate reward hacking
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于偏好优化的LLM推荐奖励黑客缓解
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于偏好优化的LLM推荐奖励黑客缓解
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Analyzes reward hacking in LLM-based recommendation from gradient perspective, formalizes epsilon-insensitive region, and proposes a preference optimization method to improve genuine recommendation gains.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 大语言模型在推荐系统中的后训练适应容易遭受奖励黑客攻击，即模型利用奖励信号的缺陷导致评估指标虚高。本文从梯度角度正式定义了ε-不敏感区域，并基于Bradley-Terry模型分析其影响。提出一种偏好优化方法，在多个推荐数据集上有效缓解奖励黑客，提升推荐的真实增益。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 缓解基于LLM的推荐中的奖励黑客：一种偏好优化方法
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: LLM推荐中的奖励黑客问题导致训练指标虚高而真实推荐效果未提升
llm_ranked.method_cn: 从梯度视角分析奖励黑客，定义ε-不敏感区域，提出偏好优化方法
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个推荐数据集上有效缓解奖励黑客，提升推荐真实增益
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 偏好优化方法能有效提升LLM推荐的可信度与效果
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: inductive generative recommendation via retrieval-based speculation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于检索推测的归纳式生成推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于检索推测的归纳式生成推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes SpecGR, a plug-and-play framework enabling generative recommendation models to recommend unseen items via a drafter-verifier architecture.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 生成式推荐在训练后难以推荐未见过的项目。本文提出SpecGR框架，利用具有归纳能力的草稿模型提出候选项目（包括新旧项目），生成式推荐模型作为验证器进行接受或拒绝。该框架即插即用，在多个数据集上展示了显著的归纳推荐性能提升。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 通过检索推测实现归纳式生成推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有生成式推荐模型主要推荐训练集见过的项目，难以泛化到新项目
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出SpecGR框架，采用草稿模型提出候选，生成模型验证，实现归纳推荐
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个数据集上显著提升生成式推荐对新项目的推荐能力
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 检索推测机制有效扩展生成式推荐到归纳场景
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: dual fluctuation modeling of multi-level intent evolution for next-item recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多层级意图演化的双波动建模用于下一项推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多层级意图演化的双波动建模用于下一项推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes DFRec to model both timing and magnitude of intent changes in sequential recommendation, outperforming existing methods.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 用户顺序行为背后意图的演变对下一项推荐至关重要，但现有方法难以捕捉意图变化的确切时机和幅度。本文提出DFRec框架，通过双波动建模对多层级意图演化进行精确刻画。在多个真实推荐数据集上，DFRec显著优于现有顺序推荐方法，具有较好的鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: DFRec：多层级意图演化的双波动建模用于下一项推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有方法难以精确捕捉用户意图变化的时间和幅度
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出DFRec，通过双波动建模多层级意图演化
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个顺序推荐数据集上取得最佳性能
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 精确建模意图变化的时间和幅度能有效提升顺序推荐效果

llm_ranked.evidence_en: cross-scale collaboration between LLMs and lightweight sequential recommenders with domain-specific reasoning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: LLM与轻量顺序推荐器的跨尺度协作及领域潜在推理
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: LLM与轻量顺序推荐器的跨尺度协作及领域潜在推理
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes a cross-scale collaboration framework combining LLM reasoning with efficient sequential models, achieving state-of-the-art on multiple benchmarks.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 顺序推荐中利用大语言模型的推理能力面临推理路径数据稀缺和语义表示脱节等问题。本文提出跨尺度协作框架，LLM负责领域特定潜在推理，轻量顺序模型进行高效推荐，二者协同工作。实验表明，该方法在多个顺序推荐基准上达到最佳性能，且推理效率较高。
llm_ranked.title_zh: LLM与轻量顺序推荐器的跨尺度协作及领域潜在推理
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: LLM在顺序推荐中推理能力受限于推理路径数据稀缺和语义表示脱节
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出跨尺度协作框架，LLM负责潜在推理，轻量模型高效推荐
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个顺序推荐基准上达到最佳性能，推理效率高
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 跨尺度协作有效利用LLM推理能力提升顺序推荐效果

llm_ranked.evidence_en: explicit intent-enhanced knowledge distillation for trip recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 显式意图增强知识蒸馏用于旅行推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 显式意图增强知识蒸馏用于旅行推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes EKD-Trip, an explicit intent-enhanced knowledge distillation framework for trip recommendation, significantly outperforming baselines on real datasets.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 旅行推荐旨在根据用户查询生成兴趣点序列，现有监督方法难以捕获POI转换模式，自监督方法无法全面建模查询意图。本文提出EKD-Trip框架，利用特权知识蒸馏显式对齐用户查询意图与轨迹，先训练轨迹编码器，再蒸馏到轻量推荐模型。实验证明该方法在真实旅行数据集上显著优于基线模型。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 显式意图增强的知识蒸馏用于旅行推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有旅行推荐方法难以同时捕获POI转换和用户查询意图
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出EKD-Trip，通过显式意图对齐的知识蒸馏提升推荐
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在真实旅行数据集上显著优于基线模型
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 显式意图增强的知识蒸馏有效提升旅行推荐质量

llm_ranked.evidence_en: sequential recommendation with frequency-enhanced dual-path networks
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于频率增强双路径网络的序列推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于频率增强双路径网络的序列推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper proposes FreqRec, a frequency-enhanced dual-path network for sequential recommendation that exploits inter-session spectral dependencies to improve next-item prediction.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文针对序列推荐中忽视跨会话频谱依赖的问题，提出FreqRec频率增强双路径网络。该方法通过融合频域模块捕获会话间频谱信息，并使用时域目标对齐预测与真实频谱，有效提升了下一个物品预测的准确性。实验表明，FreqRec在多个序列推荐数据集上取得了最优结果，验证了频谱信息在序列建模中的价值。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 利用频率增强双路径网络挖掘会话间信息进行序列推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有频率感知方法孤立处理每个会话，忽略了跨会话的频谱依赖关系。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出FreqRec，包含频域增强模块和双路径架构，建模会话间频谱依赖性。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个序列推荐数据集上，FreqRec在命中率和NDCG指标上显著优于基线。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 利用会话间频谱信息能有效提升序列推荐的性能。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: self-supervised hypergraph sequential recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 自监督超图序列推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 自监督超图序列推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper proposes S2HyRec, a self-supervised hypergraph framework for sequential recommendation that models global and temporal intents while handling noise.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文针对序列推荐中用户意图时间建模不足和数据噪声问题，提出S2HyRec自监督超图序列推荐框架。该框架包含全局意图倾向模块和时序上下文意图模块，分别捕获长期偏好和动态兴趣，并通过超图结构增强表示。实验表明，S2HyRec在多个序列推荐数据集上达到最优，验证了超图在序列建模中的有效性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: S²HyRec: 自监督超图序列推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有序列推荐未有效区分全局意图和时序上下文意图，且易受噪声影响。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出自监督超图框架，包含全局意图和时序上下文两个模块，利用超图建模复杂关系。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在基准数据集上，S2HyRec在推荐准确率上优于现有序列推荐方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 超图自监督学习能有效提升序列推荐的鲁棒性和准确性。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Uncertainty-aware exposure regulation for recommender systems
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 推荐系统中不确定性感知的曝光调节
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 推荐系统中不确定性感知的曝光调节
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes CORAL, a model-agnostic framework that regulates exposure concentration in recommender systems using uncertainty-aware risk estimates and constrained sequential decision making.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有推荐系统因反馈驱动导致曝光集中，降低目录覆盖度。本文提出CORAL，一种模型无关的不确定性感知框架，将曝光调节建模为约束序列决策问题，通过置信上界估计违规风险，从而有效缓解曝光集中问题，提升长期学习效果。
llm_ranked.title_zh: CORAL：推荐系统中不确定性感知的曝光浓度调节
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 推荐系统因重复优化互动导致曝光集中于少数类别，降低目录覆盖度，现有方法缺乏不确定性感知的风险估计。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出CORAL框架，将曝光调节建模为约束序列决策问题，构建曝光饱和状态并推导类别条件违规风险的置信上界。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个数据集上有效缓解曝光集中，提升目录覆盖度和长期推荐性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: CORAL提供了一种原则性的不确定性感知曝光调节方法，可广泛应用于各种推荐系统。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Multimodal graph recommendation with sign-aware deep learning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于符号感知的多模态图推荐深度学习
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于符号感知的多模态图推荐深度学习
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes a sign-aware multimodal graph recommendation method that distinguishes positive and negative feedback, improving recommendation by leveraging negative semantics.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有多模态推荐系统忽视正负反馈的语义差异。本文提出符号感知的多模态图推荐方法，通过符号图分别建模正负反馈信号，有效利用负反馈信息提升推荐性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 符号感知多模态图推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 传统多模态推荐忽略高低评分交互的语义差异，未能充分利用负反馈信息。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出符号图机制，分别建模正负反馈信号，并融合多模态特征进行图推荐。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 实验证明区分正负反馈能显著提升推荐准确率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 符号感知建模是提升推荐系统性能的有效途径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Unified item tokenization for multi-domain LLM-based recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向多领域LLM推荐系统的统一物品分词
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向多领域LLM推荐系统的统一物品分词
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes UniTok, a unified item tokenization framework using mixture-of-experts and codebooks to enable scalable multi-domain LLM-based recommendation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有物品分词方法需为每个领域训练独立模型，泛化性差。本文提出UniTok，集成混合专家架构和多码本，将物品转化为离散标记，实现多领域统一且可扩展的LLM推荐。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 一次分词，处处推荐：面向多领域LLM推荐系统的统一物品分词
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有物品分词方法跨领域泛化能力有限，无法统一处理多领域物品。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出UniTok框架，采用混合专家架构和系列码本将物品转换为离散标记，支持多领域统一分词。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个领域数据集上取得优异性能，支持冷启动推荐。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 统一物品分词是实现可扩展多领域LLM推荐的关键技术。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Context-aware priors for multimodal video recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 上下文感知先验的多模态视频推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 上下文感知先验的多模态视频推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes VBF++ with context-aware priors and adversarial refinement for multimodal video recommendation, addressing fusion strategy limitations.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 多模态视频推荐面临融合策略先验与上下文无关、优化目标与推荐目标不一致的问题。本文提出VBF++，引入上下文感知先验和推荐引导对抗精炼，实现更优的融合和排序性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: VBF++：具有上下文感知先验和推荐引导对抗精炼的变分贝叶斯融合用于多模态视频推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有融合策略使用上下文无关先验，且优化目标与推荐排名不一致。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出变分贝叶斯融合框架，引入上下文感知先验，并通过推荐引导对抗精炼对齐优化目标。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在视频推荐任务上取得显著性能提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 上下文感知先验和任务对齐优化是多模态推荐的关键。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Generalizable LLM-based recommendation framework
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 可泛化的LLM推荐框架
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 可泛化的LLM推荐框架
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes RecCocktail, a generalizable and efficient framework combining multi-domain instruction data and domain-specific enhancement for LLM-based recommendation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有LLM推荐方法将通用推荐和领域特定推荐分开处理。本文提出RecCocktail，结合多领域指令数据和领域增强，实现两方面的互补优势，提升推荐泛化性和领域性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: RecCocktail：一种可泛化且高效的LLM推荐框架
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有LLM推荐方法未能有效结合通用推荐和领域特定推荐的优势。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出RecCocktail框架，集成多领域指令数据微调和领域特定增强模块。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多种推荐场景下表现优异，尤其冷启动场景。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 结合通用和领域特定知识是LLM推荐的有效路径。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: federated recommendation system
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 联邦推荐系统
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 联邦推荐系统
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes FedEM, a personalized model merging approach to overcome the aggregation bottleneck in federated recommendation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 联邦推荐中服务器聚合会损害客户端个性化，导致聚合瓶颈。本文提出FedEM，通过弹性融合全局和本地模型补偿个性化损失。理论分析和实验证明FedEM在多个联邦推荐场景中优于现有方法，兼顾了隐私与性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 突破联邦推荐中的聚合瓶颈：个性化模型融合方法
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 联邦推荐中聚合过程削弱了客户端个性化能力，导致性能下降。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出FedEM，弹性融合全局与本地模型以恢复个性化。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个联邦推荐数据集上，FedEM显著优于现有方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 模型融合有效解决了联邦推荐的聚合瓶颈。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Multimodal travel assistant with dataset and reasoning for travel planning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多模态旅行助手，包含数据集和结构化推理，支持旅行规划
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多模态旅行助手，包含数据集和结构化推理，支持旅行规划
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces TraveLLaMA, a multimodal LLM for travel assistance with TravelQA dataset and Travel-CoT reasoning framework; supports travel planning and recommendation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有旅行助手缺乏专业知识和情境理解。本文提出TraveLLaMA多模态语言模型，构建了包含26.5万问答对的TravelQA数据集和Travel-CoT结构化推理框架。该方法能够分解旅行查询并生成合理推荐，在旅行规划任务上表现出色。该工作为旅游推荐系统的智能化提供了基础数据和推理范式。
llm_ranked.title_zh: TraveLLaMA：大规模数据集和结构化推理的多模态旅行助手
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有旅行助手缺乏专业知识和上下文理解能力，无法提供个性化旅行推荐。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建包含文本和视觉问答的大规模数据集TravelQA，并设计Travel-CoT结构化推理框架分解旅行查询。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在旅行规划任务上，TraveLLaMA比基线模型有显著提升，验证了数据集和推理框架的有效性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: TraveLLaMA为旅游推荐系统提供了多模态数据和推理能力，有望推动个性化旅行助手发展。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Multimodal recommendation with subspace-aware graph and contrastive alignment
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 结合子空间感知图和对比对齐的多模态推荐方法
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 结合子空间感知图和对比对齐的多模态推荐方法
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Presents SCALE framework for multimodal recommendation using subspace-aware graph construction and contrastive alignment with LLMs, capturing cross-entity semantic relationships.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 多模态推荐中，现有方法仅构建浅层次图结构，且协同信号压制语义知识。本文提出SCALE框架，通过子空间感知图构建捕获用户-物品间复杂语义关系，并利用对比对齐平衡协同与语义。实验证明SCALE在多个多模态推荐数据集上超越现有方法，有效融合多模态信息。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 子空间感知图构建与对比对齐：结合大语言模型的多模态推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有方法难以建模跨实体语义关系，且协同信号主导导致语义知识被压制。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 构建子空间感知的用户-物品图，并通过对比学习对齐协同和语义表征。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个数据集上，SCALE在推荐准确率和多样性指标上均达到领先水平。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 子空间感知图能够有效整合多模态信息和协同信号，提升推荐质量。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Multi-agent motivation generation for sequential recommendation with LLMs
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多智能体动机生成方法用于顺序推荐，融合大语言模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多智能体动机生成方法用于顺序推荐，融合大语言模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes MoMoREC for sequential recommendation, using multi-agent motivation generation to understand user purchase reasons and improve LLM-based embeddings.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有LLM推荐方法对用户购买动机理解不足，且高维嵌入与ID嵌入不兼容。本文提出MoMoREC，采用多智能体协同生成用户动机解释，并设计残差语义ID感知机制融合LLM与ID嵌入。实验表明MoMoREC在顺序推荐任务上优于现有LLM方法，同时降低推理开销。
llm_ranked.title_zh: MoMoREC：残差语义ID感知推荐的多智能体动机生成框架
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 大语言模型推荐缺乏对用户购买原因的理解，且嵌入维度不兼容。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 设计多智能体生成用户动机序列，通过残差连接融合ID嵌入和LLM语义。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个数据集上，MoMoREC在召回率和可解释性上全面优于基线。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 动机生成和残差融合能有效增强LLM在顺序推荐中的效果。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Bidirectional counterfactual distillation for review-based recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 双向反事实蒸馏方法用于基于评论的推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 双向反事实蒸馏方法用于基于评论的推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes bidirectional counterfactual distillation to address rating bias and feature homogenization in review-based recommendation, improving preference representation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 基于评论的推荐方法在跨行为知识迁移中面临评分分布偏差和特征同质化问题。本文提出双向反事实蒸馏框架，通过反事实干预消除评分偏差，并设计双向蒸馏避免特征同质化。实验证明，该方法在多个推荐数据集上有效提升了推荐准确性和鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 双向反事实蒸馏用于基于评论的推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有跨行为知识迁移受评分分布偏差和特征同质化影响，损害推荐效果。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 采用反事实推理消除评分偏差，并引入双向蒸馏机制保持特征多样性。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个真实推荐数据集上，该方法在点击率和评分预测上均优于基线。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 反事实蒸馏能有效消除偏差，提升推荐系统的鲁棒性和准确性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Generative recommendation, cross-modal quantization
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 生成式推荐，跨模态量化
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 生成式推荐，跨模态量化
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Multi-Aspect Cross-modal Quantization (MCQ) for generative recommendation learns high-quality semantic identifiers by harnessing multimodal information and capturing deep interactions among modalities.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 生成式推荐依赖高质量的语义标识符，但现有方法难以充分利用多模态信息。本文提出多视角跨模态量化方法，通过层次化组织不同模态的交互，生成低冲突、结构化的物品标识符。实验证明该方法提升了生成式推荐的准确性和效率，为利用多模态数据提供了新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 面向生成式推荐的多视角跨模态量化方法
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 生成式推荐需要高质量的语义标识符，但现有方法缺乏对多模态信息的有效利用。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出多视角跨模态量化方法，通过层次化离散化多模态特征，生成结构化的物品标识符。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个推荐数据集上，该方法在推荐准确性和效率方面均取得显著提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 利用多视角跨模态量化可有效提升生成式推荐中物品标识符的质量。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: LLM-based generative recommendation, multi-level alignment
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于大语言模型的生成式推荐，多层次对齐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于大语言模型的生成式推荐，多层次对齐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Align3GR unifies token-level, behavior-level, and preference-level alignment for LLM-based generative recommendation, bridging semantic and behavioral gaps.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 大语言模型应用于推荐系统时存在语义和行为对齐问题。本文提出Align3GR框架，通过双重分词、双向语义对齐和渐进式DPO策略，统一了令牌级、行为建模级和偏好级对齐。实验表明该方法显著提升了生成式推荐的性能，推动了LLM在推荐中的实用化。
llm_ranked.title_zh: Align³GR：面向大语言模型生成式推荐的统一多层次对齐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 将大语言模型用于推荐时存在语义和行为层面的不对齐问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出Align3GR，融合协同信号的双重分词、双向语义对齐和渐进式偏好优化。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个推荐基准上，Align3GR超越了现有基于LLM的推荐方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 统一多层次对齐能有效释放大语言模型在推荐中的潜力。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Conversational recommender, knowledge graphs, PLMs
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 对话推荐，知识图谱，预训练语言模型
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 对话推荐，知识图谱，预训练语言模型
llm_ranked.tldr_en: PCRS-TKA enhances conversational recommender systems by integrating PLMs with tree-structured knowledge from KGs, using retrieval-augmented generation for context-aware recommendations.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有结合知识图谱的对话推荐方法未能充分利用PLM对图关系的推理，且知识检索缺乏上下文过滤。本文提出PCRS-TKA，构建对话特定知识树并序列化，通过检索增强生成提升推荐准确性。实验证明该方法有效减少了幻觉，提升了推荐质量。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于树状知识和预训练语言模型的对话推荐系统增强
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有方法未能充分利用PLM对知识图谱关系的推理，且知识检索缺乏上下文过滤。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出PCRS-TKA，构建对话特定知识树并进行序列化，采用检索增强生成整合PLM与KG。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个对话推荐数据集上，PCRS-TKA在推荐准确性和对话流畅性上均取得提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 树状知识结构和上下文过滤能显著增强对话推荐系统的知识利用。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Event scheduling recommendation, travel-related constraints
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 事件调度推荐，旅游相关约束
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 事件调度推荐，旅游相关约束
llm_ranked.tldr_en: CoS uses Chain-of-Scheduling with LLMs to recommend optimal event schedules under time and geographical constraints, relevant to travel and tourism.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 事件社会网络中的行程推荐需同时满足用户偏好、时间和地理约束，属于NP难问题。本文提出CoS框架，通过分解为探索、验证和集成三个阶段，激活大语言模型的调度能力。实验表明CoS在效率和效果上优于传统方法，为旅游行程规划提供了新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: CoS：基于调度链的优化事件调度
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 事件调度推荐面临时间、地理约束，且为NP难问题，现有方法在效率与效果间难以平衡。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出Chain-of-Scheduling框架，将调度任务分解为探索、验证和集成三个原子阶段，引导大语言模型生成调度方案。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在事件社会网络数据集上，CoS在推荐准确率和效率上均显著优于基线方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 大语言模型通过结构化引导可有效解决事件调度推荐问题。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: task-aware retrieval augmentation for dynamic sequential recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 动态顺序推荐的任务感知检索增强
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 动态顺序推荐的任务感知检索增强
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes TarDGR, a task-aware retrieval-augmented framework for dynamic recommendation, addressing generalization issues from temporal discrepancies in pre-trained GNNs.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 动态推荐系统中，预训练图神经网络微调时因时间分布差异导致泛化能力不足。本文提出TarDGR框架，通过任务感知评估机制与检索增强模块，协同提升模型对用户偏好演变的建模能力。在多个真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有动态推荐模型。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 任务感知检索增强用于动态推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 预训练动态图神经网络因时间分布差异导致微调泛化差
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出TarDGR，结合任务感知评估和检索增强，提升对偏好演变的捕获
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个数据集上显著优于现有动态推荐方法
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 任务感知检索增强有效提升动态推荐的泛化能力

llm_ranked.evidence_en: social recommender system with GNN and multiview contrastive learning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 结合GNN和多视角对比学习的社交推荐系统
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 结合GNN和多视角对比学习的社交推荐系统
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes SGMT, a social recommender system combining GNN with multiview contrastive learning to handle sparsity and improve representation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 协同过滤中用户-项目交互稀疏是主要难题。本文提出SGMT框架，通过生成社交链接和结合增强与非增强视角的对比学习，提升GNN推荐器的高阶表征能力。实验表明，SGMT在多个社交推荐数据集上显著优于现有方法。
llm_ranked.title_zh: SGMT：推荐系统中基于多视角引导调优的社会生成方法
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 用户-项目交互稀疏制约协同过滤，现有社交推荐依赖显式关系
llm_ranked.method_cn: 利用社交生成和多视角对比学习，增强GNN推荐器表征
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个社交推荐数据集上显著优于现有方法
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 多视角对比学习与社交生成有效缓解稀疏问题

llm_ranked.evidence_en: scaling laws for LLM in recommendation via principled synthetic data
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 通过原则性合成数据发现LLM推荐中的缩放定律
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 通过原则性合成数据发现LLM推荐中的缩放定律
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces a layered synthetic data generation framework that enables the first scaling laws for LLMs in recommendation, guiding resource allocation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 大语言模型在推荐系统中的应用缺乏可预测的缩放定律。本文假设原始交互数据中的噪声和偏差是阻碍因素，并设计了一种分层合成数据生成框架，创建教学式课程数据。实验表明，在该合成数据上训练的标准顺序模型显示出清晰的缩放行为，首次为LLM推荐建立了缩放定律，对研究资源配置有重要指导意义。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 原则性合成数据首次发现LLM在推荐中的缩放定律
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: LLM推荐缺乏可预测的缩放定律，阻碍资源分配
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出分层合成数据生成框架，创建教学式课程数据
llm_ranked.result_cn: 标准顺序模型在合成数据上显示出清晰的缩放行为
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 首次为LLM推荐建立缩放定律，指导研究资源优化
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: deep learning method (graph contrastive learning) for collaborative filtering in recommender systems
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 推荐系统中用于协同过滤的深度学习图对比学习
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 推荐系统中用于协同过滤的深度学习图对比学习
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper revisits graph contrastive learning for collaborative filtering, proposing parallel graph filters to overcome over-smoothing and gradient saturation, achieving improved recommendation quality.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文重新审视了协同过滤中的图对比学习方法，提出并行图滤波器来解决多层图卷积导致的过平滑和负样本梯度饱和问题。该方法通过并行滤波增强表示区分度，在多个推荐数据集上显著提升了推荐精度，为图对比学习在推荐系统中的应用提供了新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 通过并行图滤波器重新审视协同过滤中的对比学习
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有图对比学习方法存在过平滑和梯度饱和问题，限制了推荐性能。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出并行图滤波器，分别处理高低频信号，避免过平滑并缓解梯度饱和。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个基准数据集上，该方法在推荐准确率上优于现有图对比学习模型。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 并行图滤波器有效提升了图对比学习在推荐系统中的表现。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Parameter-efficient learning for deep learning-based recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向深度推荐模型的参数高效学习
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向深度推荐模型的参数高效学习
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Reveals feature and structural redundancy in deep learning recommender models and proposes REACTION for parameter-efficient learning.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文从信息论角度证明现有深度学习推荐模型存在特征冗余和结构冗余。提出REACTION方法，通过信息论裁剪冗余特征和参数，实现参数高效学习，降低计算复杂度而不损失性能。
llm_ranked.title_zh: REACTION：面向推荐的参数高效学习
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 深度学习推荐模型存在显著的特征和结构冗余，导致计算复杂度高。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 从信息论角度识别冗余，并提出REACTION方法进行参数高效学习。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在保持推荐性能的同时大幅减少参数和计算量。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 信息论指导的参数压缩是提升推荐模型效率的有效手段。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Social network rectification for recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向推荐的社会网络修正
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向推荐的社会网络修正
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes DRSoRec to rectify noisy social networks by removing spurious edges and preserving useful connections for social recommendation.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有社交推荐中原始社交网络包含噪音。本文提出DRSoRec，通过不变社会理由发现和自适应连接修正，去除噪音边并保留有用信息，提升社交推荐鲁棒性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: DRSoRec：面向推荐的社会网络双重修正
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 社交推荐中原始社会网络存在噪音和缺失边，影响推荐质量。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出双重修正模型，包含不变社会理由发现模块和自适应连接修正模块。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个社交推荐数据集上显著提升推荐准确率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 社交网络修正是提升社交推荐性能的有效方法。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: context-aware recommendation with geographic tokenization
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 结合地理标记的上下文感知推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 结合地理标记的上下文感知推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces LGSID, an LLM-aligned geographic item tokenization framework for local-life recommendation that captures fine-grained spatial characteristics.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有文本推荐方法在本地生活服务中无法捕捉细粒度空间特征。本文提出LGSID框架，利用强化学习对齐地理LLM，并通过层次化地理标记编码空间信息。实验表明LGSID在本地生活推荐任务中显著优于传统方法，提升了位置感知能力。
llm_ranked.title_zh: LLM对齐的地理物品标记化框架用于本地生活推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 文本推荐方法在本地服务中难以捕捉物品间的精细空间特征。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出LGSID，包含基于强化学习的地理LLM对齐和层次化地理标记。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在本地生活推荐数据集上，LGSID显著提升推荐准确率。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 结合地理信息的标记化有效增强了推荐系统的上下文感知能力。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: recommender systems self-improvement framework
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 推荐系统自改进框架
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 推荐系统自改进框架
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes RSIR, a recursive self-improving recommendation framework that bootstraps model performance without external data using fidelity control.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 推荐系统训练数据稀疏是主要瓶颈。本文提出RSIR框架，模型自我生成交互序列，经保真度过滤后增强自身。在多个推荐数据集上，RSIR显著提升性能，为数据稀疏场景提供了新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 推荐系统能自我教学吗？一种带保真度控制的递归自改进框架
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 推荐系统面临训练数据稀疏和优化困难的问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出RSIR，模型生成序列并过滤后用于自改进。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个数据集上，RSIR提升了推荐性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 递归自改进有效缓解数据稀疏问题。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Cross-domain recommendation, disentangled representations
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 跨领域推荐，解耦表示
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 跨领域推荐，解耦表示
llm_ranked.tldr_en: DPGCDR learns symmetric group-aware representations from user and item perspectives for cross-domain recommendation, addressing heterogeneity in user preferences and item appeal.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 跨领域推荐面临用户偏好和物品吸引力的异质性挑战。本文提出DPGCDR，从用户和物品双视角动态聚类组，并对称地解耦表示。该方法在多个跨领域数据集上取得了最优性能，验证了考虑组感知解耦的有效性。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 双视角解耦：学习对称组感知表示用于跨领域推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 跨领域推荐中用户偏好和物品吸引力存在异质性，现有解耦方法忽略了组级信息。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出DPGCDR模型，动态将用户聚类为组、物品聚类为主题，并对称解耦共享和特定成分。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个跨领域推荐数据集上，DPGCDR显著优于现有跨领域推荐方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 双视角组感知解耦能有效缓解跨领域推荐中的数据稀疏和异质性。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Multimodal LLMs, large recommendation models, lifelong behavior
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 多模态大语言模型，大规模推荐模型，终身行为
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 多模态大语言模型，大规模推荐模型，终身行为
llm_ranked.tldr_en: DMGIN integrates multimodal LLMs with large recommendation models for lifelong user post-click behavior modeling, addressing computational and architectural mismatches.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 大规模推荐模型在处理终身用户行为序列时面临计算和架构挑战，多模态嵌入的引入加剧了问题。本文提出DMGIN，通过多模态LLM增强推荐模型，有效融合多模态信息并优化计算效率。实验表明该方法在点击率预测上显著提升，同时保持了较低的计算开销。
llm_ranked.title_zh: DMGIN：多模态大语言模型如何增强大规模推荐模型用于终身用户点击后行为
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 大规模推荐模型处理终身行为序列时存在计算开销大和多模态融合困难。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出DMGIN，利用多模态大语言模型与推荐模型协同，有效融入多模态特征。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在点击率预测任务上，DMGIN降低了计算成本并提升了预测准确性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 多模态大语言模型能有效增强大规模推荐模型的终身行为建模能力。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: deep learning based multimodal recommendation with disentanglement and fusion
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于深度学习的多模态推荐解耦与融合
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于深度学习的多模态推荐解耦与融合
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper proposes DHMRec, a collaboration-guided multimodal disentanglement and hierarchical fusion framework for recommendation, addressing modality redundancy and integration challenges.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文提出DHMRec框架，用于多模态推荐系统中的模态解耦与层次化融合。该方法通过协作引导解耦冗余信号和噪声，并采用层次融合策略整合不同模态表示，以反映用户偏好。实验证明，DHMRec在多个多模态推荐任务上优于现有方法，有效提升了推荐质量。
llm_ranked.title_zh: DHMRec: 协作引导的多模态解耦与层次化融合推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 多模态推荐中存在模态信息冗余和融合困难的问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出协作引导的多模态解耦和层次化融合方法，分离冗余信号并自适应整合。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在真实数据集上，DHMRec在推荐准确率上超越了多种多模态推荐模型。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 解耦与层次化融合能有效提升多模态推荐性能。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: deep learning based LLM recommender with uncertainty guided re-ranking
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 基于深度学习的大语言模型推荐系统的不确定性引导重排序
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 基于深度学习的大语言模型推荐系统的不确定性引导重排序
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper proposes GUIDER, an uncertainty guided dynamic re-ranking framework for LLM-based recommender systems to mitigate hallucinations and improve reliability.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文针对大语言模型推荐系统的不确定性和幻觉问题，提出GUIDER不确定性引导动态重排序框架。该方法通过量化LLM生成推荐的置信度，动态调整排序以过滤不可靠输出。实验表明，GUIDER在减少幻觉、提升推荐可信度方面效果显著，为LLM在推荐中的可靠应用提供了新方案。
llm_ranked.title_zh: GUIDER: 面向大语言模型推荐系统的不确定性引导动态重排序
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: LLM推荐系统存在数据稀疏、幻觉和缺乏透明性等问题。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出不确定性量化方法，动态重排序以降低不可靠推荐的影响。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在推荐数据集上，GUIDER提升了推荐准确性和用户信任度。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 不确定性引导重排序能有效增强LLM推荐系统的可靠性。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: LLM-based recommender with collaborative signals and RL
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 融合协作信号和强化学习的大语言模型推荐系统
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 融合协作信号和强化学习的大语言模型推荐系统
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper proposes TWiCE-Rec, a rationale-aware LLM recommender that integrates collaborative filtering signals via reinforcement learning to bridge reasoning and behavior patterns.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文针对大语言模型推荐缺乏协作信号的问题，提出TWiCE-Rec。该方法通过强化学习将协同过滤信号融入LLM推理过程，生成基于用户-物品交互的解释性推荐。实验表明，TWiCE-Rec在推荐准确性和解释质量上均优于仅使用LLM或CF的方法，实现了推理与行为的有效统一。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 智慧思考，高效协作：基于协作信号强化学习的理性感知大语言模型推荐系统
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 大语言模型推荐性能受限于缺乏用户-物品交互的协作模式。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 使用强化学习融合协同过滤信号，构建理性感知推荐器。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在推荐任务上，TWiCE-Rec在准确率和解释性上均取得提升。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 结合协作信号能显著增强LLM推荐系统的表现。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: deep learning recommendation model training optimization
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 深度学习推荐模型训练优化
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 深度学习推荐模型训练优化
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces FusedRec, a fused embedding communication mechanism for distributed GPU training of deep learning recommendation models.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 分布式训练DLRM存在通信碎片化问题。本文提出FusedRec，通过融合嵌入通信和查找机制减少碎片化，提升训练效率。实验表明FusedRec在多个GPU集群上显著加速训练过程，适用于大规模推荐服务。
llm_ranked.title_zh: FusedRec：面向分布式推荐训练的融合嵌入通信方法
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有去重策略导致分布式DLRM训练中通信碎片化，影响性能。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出FusedRec，通过融合嵌入通信和查找减少碎片。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在GPU集群上训练速度提升显著。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 融合通信有效解决分布式推荐训练瓶颈。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: search for deep learning based recommendation models

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Two-stage mechanism design for exploration-exploitation in recommender systems
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 推荐系统中针对探索-利用权衡的两阶段机制设计
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 推荐系统中针对探索-利用权衡的两阶段机制设计
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes a two-stage mechanism for incentivized exploration in recommender systems with stochastic covariates, achieving sublinear regret under incentive constraints.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 推荐系统面临探索新物品与用户自利偏好的冲突。本文提出两阶段机制设计，在随机协变量场景下通过线性奖励结构实现次线性遗憾并满足激励约束。该方法为鼓励推荐系统探索新项目提供理论基础，兼顾用户激励。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 带随机协变量的激励探索：推荐系统的两阶段机制设计
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 推荐系统需要在探索新物品和满足用户偏好之间权衡，现有方法难以处理随机用户协变量。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出两阶段框架，利用线性奖励结构同时实现次线性遗憾和激励相容约束。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 理论证明所提机制达到次线性后悔界，并满足贝叶斯激励相容性。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该机制为推荐系统中的在线探索提供了可行的激励方案。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Membership inference attack on LLM-based recommendation systems
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 针对基于大语言模型推荐系统的成员推理攻击
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 针对基于大语言模型推荐系统的成员推理攻击
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Introduces a knowledge distillation-based MIA paradigm for LLM-based recommendation systems, improving attack success by constructing reference models.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 传统成员推理攻击在LLM推荐系统上效果不佳。本文提出基于知识蒸馏的攻击范式，通过蒸馏构建参考模型，对成员和非成员数据采用不同策略。实验表明，该方法在多个推荐数据集上显著提升了攻击成功率，揭示了LLM推荐系统的隐私风险。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 基于知识蒸馏的成员推理攻击：针对大语言模型推荐系统的新范式
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有成员推理攻击在规模庞大的LLM推荐系统上性能下降。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 利用知识蒸馏构建参考模型，分别对成员和非成员数据设计不同策略以增强区分度。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个推荐数据集上，攻击成功率和准确率均显著高于传统方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 该工作揭示了LLM推荐系统的隐私泄露风险，需加强防御。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: Unified search and recommendation, long- and short-term interests
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 统一搜索与推荐，长短时兴趣
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 统一搜索与推荐，长短时兴趣
llm_ranked.tldr_en: DHIM disentangles and integrates long- and short-term interests for unified search and recommendation, addressing temporal dynamics differences.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 现有统一搜索推荐框架未能区分用户的长短时兴趣，忽略了其在不同场景下的不同动态。本文提出DHIM，从搜索和推荐中独立提取长短时兴趣并整合。实验表明该模型在联合搜索推荐任务上的性能优于现有统一方法。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 面向统一搜索与推荐的双视角兴趣模型
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 搜索与推荐统一框架中，用户长短时兴趣的动态差异被忽视。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出DHIM，从搜索和推荐中独立提取长短时兴趣,并通过统一策略整合。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在统一搜索推荐基准上，DHIM在多个指标上取得了领先性能。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 显式建模长短时兴趣能有效提升搜索推荐的统一性能。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: deep learning methods for recommender systems

llm_ranked.evidence_en: adaptive calibration framework for reliable recommendations
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 面向可靠推荐的适应性校准框架
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 面向可靠推荐的适应性校准框架
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper proposes CARE, an adaptive calibration framework for recommender systems that provides finite-sample performance guarantees and handles behavior shifts.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文针对推荐系统部署后用户行为演变导致性能下降的问题，提出CARE适应性校准框架。该方法结合损失监测和在线聚合规则，动态调整推荐集大小并提供性能保证。实验证明，CARE能在保持推荐质量的同时适应行为变化，为推荐系统的可靠性提供了理论保障。
llm_ranked.title_zh: CARE: 可靠推荐的适应性校准
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 推荐系统离线训练后部署，用户行为变化导致推荐质量下降且缺乏保障。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 提出基于损失监测和动态重加权的适应性校准框架，提供有限样本性能保证。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在流式推荐场景中，CARE有效维持了推荐准确率并提供了可靠性保证。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 适应性校准能增强推荐系统在动态环境中的鲁棒性和可信度。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: novel recommender system setting using partial label learning
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 利用部分标签学习的新型推荐系统设置
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 利用部分标签学习的新型推荐系统设置
llm_ranked.tldr_en: This paper proposes PARS, a partial-label-learning-inspired recommender system that trains solely on user browsing histories without explicit feedback.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 本文提出一种新的推荐场景，仅利用用户浏览历史而无显式反馈，并借鉴部分标签学习提出PARS方法。该方法假设浏览序列包含待获取物品，通过弱监督学习训练推荐模型。实验表明，PARS在无显式反馈条件下仍能有效推荐，为推荐系统在数据稀疏场景下提供了新思路。
llm_ranked.title_zh: PARS: 受部分标签学习启发的推荐系统
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现实场景中常缺乏用户显式反馈，仅有点击浏览等隐式数据。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 将浏览序列类比为部分标签学习问题，训练推荐模型。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在基准数据集上，PARS在无显式反馈时仍取得良好推荐效果。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 部分标签学习方法能有效利用浏览历史进行推荐。

llm_ranked.evidence_en: knowledge graph for learning path recommendation
llm_ranked.evidence_cn: 知识图谱用于学习路径推荐
llm_ranked.canonical_evidence: 知识图谱用于学习路径推荐
llm_ranked.tldr_en: Proposes GraphRAG-based dual knowledge structure graphs for personalized learning path recommendation, addressing prerequisite relation scarcity.
llm_ranked.tldr_cn: 学习路径推荐依赖先序关系，但标注成本高且单结构易导致学习阻塞。本文利用图RAG构建双知识结构图，融合概念与练习关系，在无需完整先序标注下生成个性化学习路径。实验表明该方法提高了学习效率并缓解了阻塞问题。
llm_ranked.title_zh: 图RAG诱导的双知识结构图用于个性化学习路径推荐
llm_ranked.motivation_cn: 现有学习路径推荐依赖难以获取的单一先序关系，且易导致学习阻塞。
llm_ranked.method_cn: 利用图RAG构建包含概念和练习关系的双知识结构图，生成学习路径。
llm_ranked.result_cn: 在多个教育数据集上，该方法优于传统先序依赖的方法。
llm_ranked.conclusion_cn: 双知识结构图有效缓解数据稀缺和学习阻塞问题。
llm_ranked.matched_query_text: Papers central to 推荐系统相关论文检索，与旅游推荐相关, especially work that connects or combines: deep learning methods for recommender systems; sequential recommendation; knowledge graph enhanced recommender systems; recommender systems; travel recommendation; context-aware recommendation; search for deep learning based recommendation models; Personalized travel recommendation algorithms; Session based recommendation for travel planning; Context aware recommender systems in tourism.
